name: dispersed_repeat_sine
description: Non-Alu SINEs: principally MIR (Mammalian-wide Interspersed Repeat, ~260 bp, ~600000 copies) and the related MIR3 subfamilies. Ancient (>100 Myr) tRNA-derived SINEs predating the primate radiation. Lower copy count and lower GC than Alu but still hundreds of thousands of copies. Consensus matches a core tRNA-like body plus a CORE-SINE domain shared across mammals.
